raw_consumer_statement: To whom it may concern, I am writing the complaint in regard to a dispute charge that had been denied. Original charge on my credit card is {$1500.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. I started the dispute on XX/XX/XXXX. My dispute had been denied by Citi Bank on XX/XX/XXXX. I disputed a charge by a fraudulent moving company, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. They charge {$1500.00} for a service fee. I had provided evidence that I had asked the company to cancel the service. But the fraudulent moving company, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, refused to refund my money back. I started the dispute but Citi Bank does not resolve my issue and still help the fraudulent moving company, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX.
